## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [9 out of 20 new articles published; 11 drafts ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ramping up publishing cadence beyond 2 articles/day, as Strapi team permits](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [New batch of 50 topics to be proposed next week](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Workflow improvements discussed, including curated content step and human QA](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Publishing

  - [9 out of 20 new articles published, 11 drafts ready](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [5 article refreshes planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New batch of 10 articles completed, pending editing](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [SEO tests created for 4 articles, to be monitored over 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy being implemented for new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Publishing Cadence

  - [Previous limit of 2 articles/day no longer relevant](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Strapi team open to ramping up publishing as QA allows](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Caution advised on backdating articles to avoid potential Google penalties](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Consideration of user experience: spreading publications throughout the day](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Knowledge transfer from GrowthX to Strapi team on content creation steps](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Detailed overview of GrowthX's AI-assisted content creation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Suggestion to add a curated content step in the process](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Proposal to include curated content URLs in the next 50-topic batch](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Team Expansion and Roles

  - [Introduction of Prateek as additional support for the account](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Clarification on roles: Yelena (content QA), Alice (scheduling/admin)](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Andre confirmed as main point of contact, supported by specialized team members](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement best practices for blog tags in the next content batch](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Prepare and send new batch of 50 topics before next Wednesday's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Add column for curated content URLs in the next topic batch spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Investigate Google's stance on backdating articles and report findings](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Consider implementing a terminal tag for SEO articles to manage homepage crowding](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Schedule a deep dive session on content creation workflows in a future call](https://fathom.video/share/Lyrzr8RmsyptCAxxQjyxjxnJGBiXBaB3?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
